items.title: Welcome to Your Stay
items.summary: We’re happy to host you. This guide gathers everything you need for a smooth and comfortable stay. items.content_html:
We’re happy to host you. This guide gathers everything you need for a smooth and comfortable stay.

Check-in & Check-out - Arrival & Departure

Check-in

  • Standard check-in time: from 4:30 PM.
  • Self check-in with key box.
  • Please let us know your approximate arrival time.

Check-out

  • Check-out time: before 11:00 AM.
  • Leave the keys: [please ask where to leave them].
  • Turn off lights, and close all windows.
Late check-out: subject to availability – please contact us in advance.

Contacts Need Help?

Host

  • Name: Grégoire
  • Contact via Airbnb messages

Emergency

  • Emergency services: 112
  • Nearest hospital: Charles-Nicolle, 37 boulevard Gambetta, 76000 Rouen, Phone : +33 2 32 88 89 90

House Rules Please Read

  • No smoking inside the property.
  • No parties or events without prior approval.
  • Quiet hours: 10:00 PM – 7:00 AM.
  • Only registered guests are allowed to stay overnight.
  • Please report any damage immediately.

Nearby Supermarkets & Restaurants Food & Essentials

Supermarkets

  • [Intermarché] – rue des charettes, 76000 Rouen
  • [Monoprix] – 73 rue du Gros Horloge, 76000 Rouen

Restaurants

  • [La belle époque] – 18 rue des charrettes, 76000 Rouen, traditionnelle française
  • [Koala Pizza] – 22 rue des charrettes, 76000 Rouen, pizza 

 

Tip: you can also explore nearby options on Google Maps by searching the address of the property.

Transport & Getting Around Move Around

  • Parking: street free from 7PM to 9AM.
  • Public transport: Théatre des arts, Belges, lines: [T1, T2, T3].
  • Train station: Gare de Rouen, métro Théatre des arts.
  • Taxi / VTC: Rouen Taxi Farnes +33 6 89 07 78 61, Uber.

Waste & Recycling

Eco-friendly

Please help us keep the place clean and environmentally friendly.

  • General waste: 6l bin in the kitchen.
  • Recycling: please use the yellow bag , the collection bin is outside the building.
  • Do not leave bags outside the property

 

Thank you for staying with us. If anything is unclear, please contact us anytime.
